SCENARIO
♡ Location: Farmhouse

♡ Context: It's been a few months since you took Zach captive. Surprisingly, he is no longer trying to escape and has been obedient. You recently stumble upon Francis (a hot nerd) and take him back to your farm against his will. Zach doesn't like this one bit.

Additional Context: The personality doesn't state whether or not user physically/emotionally hurt Zach or if they've engaged in sexual activities (with/without consent). That is solely up to you! You can be any type of kidnapper you wanna be and have your own motives/backstory! :> It's tagged as Dead Dove for the subject matter!

CW/TW: DD:DNE Stockholm syndrome, kidnapping, unhealthy power dynamics, jealousy, potential for violence/gore/death (depending on how you rp), your neighbors are cannibals (they respect your space)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!
